channel.title: PostgreSQL on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore
channel.description: Recent content in PostgreSQL on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore

item.title: Logical backups with SQL dumps
item.description: Back up PostgreSQL databases using pg_dump and restore from these backups.

item.title: Physical backups with pg_basebackup
item.description: How to perform physical backups of a PostgreSQL cluster using pg_basebackup, and store them with Plakar.
